creator: eogren@earthlink.net
text:
Sometime last week, spurred by people in -stable attacking our
documentation, I rewrote the majority of the cutting-edge chapter,
adding/deleting content, and majorly reorganizing it.
	I submitted this to -doc last week sometime asking for comments,
and no one replied which I assume means nobody had any objections (or that
nobody looked at it), so I'm submitting it.
	Because of the size of the patch, it's gzip'd and uuencoded.

 >How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
